name: rename_port
full_help:
rename_port

Description: 
rename a port

Syntax: 
rename_port  -to <arg> [-quiet] [-verbose] <port>...

Usage: 
  Name        Description
  -----------------------
  -to         New name
  [-quiet]    Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]  Suspend message limits during command execution
  <port>      Port to rename

Categories: 
Netlist

arguments.description: Suspend message limits during command execution
